indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The presence of a couch suggests a living area rather than a dedicated workspace.

indicators.name: coffee table
indicators.rationale: A coffee table is not suitable for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows can lead to glare and distractions.

indicators.name: curtains
indicators.rationale: Curtains can block natural light and create a dim environment.

indicators.name: lack of flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of a couch and coffee table, along with the large windows and curtains, suggest a living area rather than a dedicated workspace. There is no flat work surface at sitting height, which is crucial for setting up a computer workstation.
